word: G1580 - ἐκκομίζω - ekkomízō - ek-kom-id'-zo - Carry out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκκομίζω

- Transliteration: Ekkomizo

- Phonetic: ek-kom-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to carry out

a. a dead man for burial

- Origin: from G1537 and G2865

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G2865; to bear forth (to burial): - carry out.
